To: Board of Directors, Luoquan Robotics Co., Ltd. (Issuer, U S C C：91Q0 R3N8 K2L5 Z7Y0 X8) — Internal memo on PIPL/CSL/DSL compliance and MNPI controls for SSE STAR Market preparation.
Under the Securities Law and CSRC guidance, the following items are inside information before public disclosure: preliminary FY2026 revenue targets, the unsigned supply agreement with Qiyu Components Ltd., and a potential land-use grant in Pingyun Science Park.
Access to the MNPI above is limited to named roles; any tip or leak triggers trading bans; do not upload to personal drives; link: https://intra.luoquan.local/mnpi/view?rid=43012319900315123X&deal=IPO-SSE.
Personal information inventory (P I P L Articles 28–30): Mr. Han Zelin (R&D), Res.ID：43 0123 1990 0315 12 3X, processes health data (Type 1 diabetes treatment schedule and glucose logs) and biomet- ric templates (face/fingerprint) for gate access.
Subtle contextual signal: his canteen profile shows fasting days aligning with temple observances, which may infer religious belief; restrict visibility to HR-only and do not export without CAC Standard Contract filing or security assessment.
Minor-sensitive: Master Han Yuchen (age 12, dependent) is listed in the benefits file with school pickup contact and a documented peanut allergy; children’s entries are tagged as sensitive PI under PIPL.
Candidate workflow: Ms. Qiao Ruo (Finance applicant) provided union membership details (Bright Workers Union, card UN-7H9-2Q4-0) during background check; this special-category field must not be used for automated rejection.
Overseas processing: selected CVs and biomet- ric vendor logs are mirrored to a testing node in Ningstrait Cloud, SG; initiate CAC cross-border filing, encrypt at rest, and bind Standard Contract terms with the processor; apply DSL data export risk scoring.
For avoidance of doubt, the note “there is no MAC under the SPA” in the draft prospectus is legal boilerplate and not material nonpublic info; likewise, “blue sky thinking” in slides is metaphorical.
Product mention not related to personal data: RiverSpark Pro uses a genetic algorithm for sorting sensor data, but no genomic sequences or human samples are processed.
DEI guidance remains generic: we value inclusion and equal opportunity; the phrase “sexual orientation policy” in the handbook is descriptive and does not list any person’s intimate life.
Sports and place references such as Blue Dragon basketball club or Pingyun stadium banners in photos are irrelevant to PI classification and shall not be tagged.
Data minimization and retention: redact religion/union in routine reports; restrict Res.ID display to **** 0315 12 3X; store U S C C in hashed form; system logs with OCR-like spacing must still be searchable.
Contact: Compliance Office, Ms. He Lanying, compliance@luoquan-robotics.example.cn, ext 7723; secure drop: https://intra.luoquan.local/submit?doc=PIPL2026&audit=R3F8.
